description: Geology Preparations for the EVA-1 Traverse

tokens: Tony, I'm going over to this crater and get you some of this white soil.
I think it is coming off of this rock here, but it looks like caliche.
I never thought I'd use that word up here; but that's what the coating looks like.
transcript.speaker: Duke

tokens: Come and look at it, John!
It might be just a total white rock.
The cross-Sun...Oh, man, are your settings going to be something terrible.
transcript.speaker: Duke

tokens: Oh, we've had a bag failure, already.
The little pull-tab came off; we can still use them, though.
transcript.speaker: Duke

tokens: Get a little shovelful of that stuff.
transcript.speaker: Duke

tokens: Gosh, Charlie, it does look like caliche.
transcript.speaker: Young

tokens: Yeah, but it's just a bunch of white frags.
transcript.speaker: Young

tokens: I'm going to get this rock here, too.
transcript.speaker: Duke

tokens: I'll get another bag for that.
transcript.speaker: Duke

tokens: I'm really ill-equipped to help you here.
transcript.speaker: Young

tokens: (To Houston) Okay, that sample of white material is going in bag 355, Houston.
transcript.speaker: Young

tokens: Okay, John, I got your picture.
transcript.speaker: Duke

tokens: Charlie, what are you doing with the dirt?
You just threw it all over yourself.
transcript.speaker: Young

tokens: I didn't mean to; the rock fell out.
transcript.speaker: Duke

tokens: You got to clean off your lens - my lens - before we can start here.
transcript.speaker: Young

tokens: No, I cleaned it off already.
transcript.speaker: Duke

tokens: It's a white matrix in this rock with some clasts.
One of the clasts just fell out.
But it really looks like a caliche matrix.
transcript.speaker: Duke

tokens: What do you want to do with these samples?
transcript.speaker: Young

tokens: Put them in this HTC (Hand Tool Carrier) right here (on the back of the Rover).
transcript.speaker: Duke

tokens: That's the one that's going on somebody's back.
transcript.speaker: Duke

tokens: It's got the core tubes in it, so it probably goes on your back.
transcript.speaker: Young

tokens: How are we doing on the timeline, Tony?
transcript.speaker: Duke

tokens: This white rock that I picked up is in bag 373.
transcript.speaker: Duke

tokens: It really works when you spin them up, Tony; it's great!
transcript.speaker: Duke

tokens: I got to change the mag on my camera.
Can you give it to me?
transcript.speaker: Duke

tokens: What are you going to do, clean me off?
transcript.speaker: Duke

tokens: Naw; I gonna clean up the camera.
Wait a second; let me put this down.
transcript.speaker: Young

tokens: I wanted to clean the camera off, too.
transcript.speaker: Young

tokens: Get that dust out of there, or we'll never get the mags in.
transcript.speaker: Young

tokens: (Handing the LMP camera to Charlie) Okay?
transcript.speaker: Young

tokens: How about cleaning yours off too.
transcript.speaker: Duke

tokens: Did you change your mag on it?
transcript.speaker: Young

tokens: Can you get my gloves a minute, John?
transcript.speaker: Duke

tokens: Just to get that loose stuff off.
transcript.speaker: Duke

tokens: Magazine Alfa is going out with 110.
transcript.speaker: Duke

tokens: That's what they (meaning the prior crews) say, all right.
transcript.speaker: Young

tokens: Magazine Golf (G/109) is going on (the LMP camera) at frame count 2.
transcript.speaker: Duke

tokens: Not a bit (of dust) on the lens, though.
transcript.speaker: Young

tokens: Okay, Charlie, which (Sample Collection) Bag (SCB) do you want?
transcript.speaker: Young

tokens: I got to get...There's a set of (individual sample) bags over here (on the LMP seat).
transcript.speaker: Duke

tokens: I'll get them...They're already...I got to load you up.
transcript.speaker: Duke

tokens: Did you get these cap dispensers.
We don't need those, do we?
transcript.speaker: Young

tokens: I think we got two core tubes.
transcript.speaker: Duke

tokens: That big rock right there (next to the Rover on the LMP side) is a breccia - look at all those clasts in there.
transcript.speaker: Young

tokens: Most of them in here (at the ALSEP site) are breccias.
transcript.speaker: Duke

tokens: I picked up one...Yeah, that's a - uh-huh - about a two-rock breccia there.
(Pause) Okay, I see you on this side.
transcript.speaker: Duke

tokens: John, you know you lost your little plate?
Tony, on that one bag dispenser on John's camera, the little ring came off of it, and the bags are just dangling loose, but we'll be able to use it still.
transcript.speaker: Duke

tokens: Come here and help me get this bag up here.
transcript.speaker: Young

tokens: I thought you wanted me to look at something.
(Pause) It would be easier to do that without the...
transcript.speaker: Duke

tokens: (Seeing a lot of dust on Charlie's PLSS) (Did) you fall down, Charlie?
transcript.speaker: Young

tokens: Can you bend over very much?
transcript.speaker: Young

tokens: We got to walk...just away a little here, so I can bend over without bumping into the Rover (garbled).
transcript.speaker: Young

tokens: That's what I tried to do, and that's when I fell down.
transcript.speaker: Duke

tokens: Let's see, the area is pretty well policed up over there (by the Central Station).
When I come back to get the core tubes (at the end of the geology traverse), I'll pick it up.
transcript.speaker: Duke

tokens: I can do that there, too.
transcript.speaker: Young

tokens: (Pointing east) There's a good place to do the Grand Prix out here.
You'll pole vault yourself right over to Stone.
transcript.speaker: Duke

tokens: Tony, looking up-Sun towards the eastern part of Stone Mountain, you cannot see those lineations, but, as we look across-Sun, those lineations are there...
transcript.speaker: Duke

tokens: Can you bend over some, Charlie?
transcript.speaker: Young

tokens: (To Tony) And they trend sort of upslope to the northwest, or to the...
transcript.speaker: Duke

tokens: It trends the same as Hadley.
transcript.speaker: England

tokens: And it goes right up over the ridge - a ridge line - and back down the ridge -the one that's got Cinco craters on it - and then back down into the ridge where...(Pause)
transcript.speaker: Duke

tokens: Boy, Charlie, it looks like we could just...Smoky and Stone Mountain look like they're 10 feet away from us.
transcript.speaker: Young

tokens: You'd just run right over there.
transcript.speaker: Duke

tokens: The thing wouldn't stay on a minute ago; now it won't come off.
transcript.speaker: Duke

tokens: Now, you can't get it off.
transcript.speaker: Young

tokens: (John chuckles and turns properly) Okay, now bend over.
transcript.speaker: Duke

tokens: We'd like a full set of readouts here; and we'd also like to verify that you have the front drive on bus A.
transcript.speaker: England

tokens: Front Drive is on bus A and...Yeah, I changed that back a while back.
transcript.speaker: Young

tokens: Okay, do y'all want to be checked with before we do that, or you just want to go ahead and do it?
(Pause; no answer) You ready to go, Charlie?
transcript.speaker: Young
